task1.title: Recent archaeological findings at a historic site in the year 2004 and 2014
task1.instruction: The following plans show recent archaeological findings at a historic site in the year 2004 and 2014. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.instruction: In education and employment, some people work harder than others. Why do some people work harder? Is it always a good thing to work hard?
